steps.title: Undo the outside multiplication
steps.content: The original equation is $$6(3x-4)=72.$$ Divide both sides by $6$ to keep the same solution while simplifying the equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The equation $3x-4=12$ is equivalent to the original equation. Dividing incorrectly or distributing only part of the $6$ changes the solution; correct distribution would give $18x-24=72$. A is correct.
